mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPLY (C_NUMBER, COMMENTS, C_DATE, P_NUMBER, USER_ID) VALUES (REPLY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{comments}, SYSDATE, #{pNumber}, #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT R.C_NUMBER, R.COMMENTS, TO_CHAR(R.C_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') C_DATE, R.P_NUMBER, R.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME FROM REPLY R JOIN USERS U ON R.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE R.P_NUMBER = #{pNumber} ORDER BY R.C_NUMBER DESC
SELECT R.C_NUMBER, R.COMMENTS, TO_CHAR(R.C_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') C_DATE, R.P_NUMBER, R.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME FROM REPLY R JOIN USERS U ON R.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE R.C_NUMBER = #{cNumber}
